description: Large bright & beautiful CORNER UNIT home in sought after Bacara Development. Welcome to trendy Clayton! A popular walkable community designed with plenty of restaurants, shopping, parks, schools & Clayton Rec Centre. This large 3 bedroom 2 bathroom unit features a gorgeous large open kitchen & custom cabinetry perfect for entertaining. The main floor also offers a large living room, gas fireplace & 2 balconies! Top floor consists of 3 spacious bedrooms with 2 full baths. Ground floor has a huge den/flex space that could be easily be another bedroom. Relax in your private south facing fenced yard with a pad sitting area. 4 car parking,  double side by side garage with 2 car driveway for additional parking. Quick and easy access to highways &transit.
